title: Tao Te Ching 7
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 7 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 7 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Heaven is eternal and earth is lasting. They can be eternal and lasting because they do not exist for themselves.
